title: (ILLUMINA MENU) Protocols for SARS-CoV-2 Library Prep with ARTIC Primers, Bioinformatic Analysis, and Database Submission
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9699j","text":"This collection of protocols covers library preparation and sequencing on Illumina platforms as well as bioinformatic analysis and submission of SARS-CoV-2 data. These frequently used protocols have been assembled by the Technical Outreach and Assistance for States Team (TOAST) and the Office of Advanced Molecular Detection (OAMD) at the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention for use by participating State, Tribal, Local, and Territorial labs for sequencing of SARS-CoV-2. Individual protocols were developed by the protocol authors, and individual protocols should be credited accordingly. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"egoo3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ub9n","text":"These documents are intended for laboratories designated by TOAST and should not be widely or openly disseminated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ke6d","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"um6sa","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"2odc3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4vqok","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9cn25","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bp6kk","text":"For technical assistance, please contact: TOAST@cdc.gov","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":42,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"image","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"62B0E306341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","height":241,"is_video":false,"legend":"{\"blocks\":[{\"key\":\"6ddvp\",\"text\":\"TOAST Illumina protocol menu overview\",\"type\":\"unstyled\",\"depth\":0,\"inlineStyleRanges\":[],\"entityRanges\":[],\"data\":{}}],\"entityMap\":{}}","mime":"image/png","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"Illumina_menu_20211014-01.png","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/files/fsd2biqdx.jpg","shadow":false,"source":"https://content.protocols.io/files/fsdybiqdx.jpg","webp_placeholder":"https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/files/fsdzbiqdx.webp","webp_source":"https://content.protocols.io/files/fsdxbiqdx.webp","width":550}}}}
